title: SGMH Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 14 Junior Resident Posts
description: The Sanjay Gandhi Memorial Hospital (SGMH Delhi) has declared the latest job notification for 2026. To fill the vacancies for 14 Junior Resident posts. Candidates who have qualified in MBBS can grab this chance and apply for the SGMH Notification 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, and salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can attend the walk-in at the address below. If you are look...
